ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andy Tran for and with Arnold Benetti (Trustee). John Endicott (Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Endicott stated that he understood waiving of account and waiving of bond. Mr. Tran stated that all of the government agencies were properly served. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertore, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Continued To Aug-12-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andy Tran for Arnold Benetti (Trustee).

Mr. Tran stated that his client could not reconcile the $52.00 difference. The Court asked if this was an all cash estate and counsel stated that it was an all cash estate. The Court granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court), and set the next accounting date for July 13, 2009 (for the period between May 1, 2008 and April 30, 2009).

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition Of Arnold Benetti Attorney-In-Fact For J.R. Endicott, For Order Auth. Establishment If Special Needs Trust With Property Of He Principal
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Continued To Apr-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for and with petitioner Arnold Benetti. Counsel does not have any proof of disability. He has counsel to get verification from Social Security. Matter is continued to 4/30. Counsel will revised the order to include bringing the trust under court supervision.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
